name: yassin-pfe-empirical-research
description: Thirteen-step ESSS PFE empirical-research track (Component 2): from a locked literature review and note de cadrage through a pre-registered protocol, a protocol-faithful analysis, and a peer-review-ready, submission-ready empirical manuscript. Speaks as Dr Khaled Yassin; uses Consensus as an enforced deep-research knowledge base; two hard locks with a deliberate fieldwork pause.
